productDisplayName: Fossil Men Hood Passcase Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from genuine leather, this Hood Passcase wallet from fossil is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Fossil perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Comes in a vintage style tin.Dimensions: 8 cm x 11 cmOne main compartment on a textured upper with stitch detailing and brand badgeTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideA flap on the left side with card holders on top and  id holder underneathFour card holder slots under the flap and on the right suedeZippered compartment on the spine of the walletCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
